prompts.title: Explain Like I'm 5
prompts.text: Explain {topic} in the simplest possible terms, as if I'm a complete beginner. Use analogies and avoid jargon.

prompts.title: Code Review Helper
prompts.text:
Review the following code for bugs, performance issues, and best practices. Suggest improvements with explanations:

{code}

prompts.title: Blog Post Outline
prompts.text: Create a detailed outline for a blog post about {topic}. Include an engaging intro hook, 5-7 main sections with sub-points, and a compelling conclusion with a call to action.

prompts.title: Debug This Error
Cold Email
prompts.text: Write a cold email to {recipient_role} at {company} pitching {offer}. Keep it under 100 words, mention one specific detail about their work to show research, and end with a single low-friction CTA.

prompts.title: Meeting Summary
prompts.description: Turn raw notes into a clean recap
prompts.text:
Take these meeting notes and turn them into a clean recap with three sections: Decisions Made, Action Items (with owner and due date), and Open Questions.

{notes}

prompts.title: Translate (Formal)
prompts.text:
Translate the following from {source_language} to {target_language}. Use a formal register suitable for business communication. Preserve any technical terms; flag anything ambiguous.

{text}

prompts.title: Research Summary
prompts.description: Distill long content into key points
prompts.text:
Summarize the following content in three layers: (1) one-sentence TL;DR, (2) five key points as bullets, (3) the strongest single quote or statistic worth remembering.

{content}
